svg.title: Sankey flow into CauseUTI b10
svg.desc: Baseline learnt Bayesian-network joint flows from direct parent states into the four Causative pathogen states.
svg.text: Edge width is P(parent state, CauseUTI state) at baseline in the learnt BN. Hover titles include conditional P(CauseUTI state | parent state).

g.text: Note: each parent is summarized separately, so total incoming target flow equals five parent summaries, not a single patient-level probability mass.
